title: How one hour before dawn changes everything
caption:
The man who owns his morning owns himself.

The world will fill your first hour if you let it. Every notification, every inbox, every other man's urgency — it rushes in the second you reach for the phone.

Beat it to the day. Give God the first hour, not the leftover. Make one hard decision while it's still quiet. Then let the rest come to you.

The morning is not a convenience. It's where you decide who runs your day.

Save this for the man who keeps waking up and immediately handing his morning to someone else.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #morningroutine #selfmastery #manofgod #christianity
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
